news.title:
Telangana HC orders CVC probe into Can Fin Homes' hiring irregularities after whistleblower allegations by AGM HR Manoj K Badal.
HC highlights public sector officials' involvement, directs CVC & RBI to investigate Canara Bank-linked Can Fin Homes' recruitment issues.
news.summary:
Telangana HC orders CVC probe into Can Fin Homes' hiring irregularities after whistleblower allegations by AGM HR Manoj K Badal.
HC highlights public sector officials' involvement, directs CVC & RBI to investigate Canara Bank-linked Can Fin Homes' recruitment issues.

news.title:
Telangana HC orders CVC probe into Can Fin Homes' recruitment scam.
Whistleblower alleges malpractices in recruitments at housing finance firm.
news.summary:
Telangana HC orders CVC probe into Can Fin Homes' recruitment scam.
Whistleblower alleges malpractices in recruitments at housing finance firm.

news.title:
Nirmal Bang lowers target prices for banks and NBFCs ahead of Q4 FY26 results; expects net profit growth of 8% YoY.
Top picks include SBI, HDFC Bank, Axis Bank, Federal Bank, Can Fin Homes, with focus on loan growth, NIMs, and asset quality.
news.summary:
Nirmal Bang lowers target prices for banks and NBFCs ahead of Q4 FY26 results; expects net profit growth of 8% YoY.
Top picks include SBI, HDFC Bank, Axis Bank, Federal Bank, Can Fin Homes, with focus on loan growth, NIMs, and asset quality.

news.title:
Can Fin Homes' MD & CEO discussed Q3 FY25-26 results, NIM, growth, and asset quality at Jefferies India 2nd NBFC Access Day.
Analyst/investor meetings involved firms like Tata AIG, Kotak Mahindra AMC, and Bajaj Allianz; no unpublished price-sensitive info shared.
news.summary:
Can Fin Homes' MD & CEO discussed Q3 FY25-26 results, NIM, growth, and asset quality at Jefferies India 2nd NBFC Access Day.
Analyst/investor meetings involved firms like Tata AIG, Kotak Mahindra AMC, and Bajaj Allianz; no unpublished price-sensitive info shared.

news.title:
Can Fin Homes Ltd confirms redemption of Rs. 500 Cr CP due on 05-03-2026.
Payment credited to CP holders; corporate action forms filed with depositories.
news.summary:
Can Fin Homes Ltd confirms redemption of Rs. 500 Cr CP due on 05-03-2026.
Payment credited to CP holders; corporate action forms filed with depositories.

news.title:
ICRA reaffirms Can Fin Homes' fixed deposit rating at A1 for Rs. 750 crore.
The rating remains valid till July 9, 2025, reflecting stable credit quality.
news.summary:
ICRA reaffirms Can Fin Homes' fixed deposit rating at A1 for Rs. 750 crore.
The rating remains valid till July 9, 2025, reflecting stable credit quality.

news.title:
Can Fin Homes received RBI approval for reappointment of MD & CEO Suresh Srinivasan Iyer.
The reappointment is for 2 years starting March 18, 2026, subject to shareholder approval.
news.summary:
Can Fin Homes received RBI approval for reappointment of MD & CEO Suresh Srinivasan Iyer.
The reappointment is for 2 years starting March 18, 2026, subject to shareholder approval.

news.title:
Can Fin Homes expects FY27 NIMs at 3.75% and spreads at 2.75%.
Credit cost guidance for FY27 is projected at 15 basis points.
news.summary:
Can Fin Homes expects FY27 NIMs at 3.75% and spreads at 2.75%.
Credit cost guidance for FY27 is projected at 15 basis points.

news.title:
Can Fin Homes projects FY26 AUM growth of 11-12%, impacted by higher prepayments.
FY27 AUM growth target is set at approximately 15% as per concall update.
news.summary:
Can Fin Homes projects FY26 AUM growth of 11-12%, impacted by higher prepayments.
FY27 AUM growth target is set at approximately 15% as per concall update.

news.title: Can Fin Homes expects positive Q4 with disbursements of ₹3,200-3,300 Cr.
news.summary: Can Fin Homes expects positive Q4 with disbursements of ₹3,200-3,300 Cr.

news.title:
Can Fin Homes' Q3 net profit rose to ₹2.6B from ₹2B YoY.
Q3 revenue increased to ₹10.6B compared to ₹9.8B YoY.
news.summary:
Can Fin Homes' Q3 net profit rose to ₹2.6B from ₹2B YoY.
Q3 revenue increased to ₹10.6B compared to ₹9.8B YoY.

news.title:
Can Fin Homes Ltd presented its Q3 FY26 financial results, showcasing a 10% YoY growth in loan book to Rs. 40,693 Cr and a PAT of Rs. 265 Cr.
NIM stood at 4.14%, GNPA at 0.92%, and RoE at 18.8%. Housing loans formed 84% of the loan book, with a focus on salaried professionals.
news.summary:
Can Fin Homes Ltd presented its Q3 FY26 financial results, showcasing a 10% YoY growth in loan book to Rs. 40,693 Cr and a PAT of Rs. 265 Cr.
NIM stood at 4.14%, GNPA at 0.92%, and RoE at 18.8%. Housing loans formed 84% of the loan book, with a focus on salaried professionals.

news.title:
Mutual Funds increased stakes in PG Electroplast (up 4.2%), RBL Bank (up 3.8%), and Can Fin Homes (up 1.4%) in Q3FY26.
Other increases include Five Star Business Finance (up 2.2%) and L&T Finance (up 1.4%), signaling confidence in growth potential.
news.summary:
Mutual Funds increased stakes in PG Electroplast (up 4.2%), RBL Bank (up 3.8%), and Can Fin Homes (up 1.4%) in Q3FY26.
Other increases include Five Star Business Finance (up 2.2%) and L&T Finance (up 1.4%), signaling confidence in growth potential.

news.title:
Can Fin Homes Ltd's board meeting on Jan 17, 2026, to approve Q3 & 9-month unaudited financial results.
Trading window closed from Jan 1-19, 2026, per SEBI insider trading regulations.
news.summary:
Can Fin Homes Ltd's board meeting on Jan 17, 2026, to approve Q3 & 9-month unaudited financial results.
Trading window closed from Jan 1-19, 2026, per SEBI insider trading regulations.

news.title:
Can Fin Homes declared a dividend of 6 per share with an ex-date of July 11, 2025.
The company achieved a total return of 18.6% over the last 3 months.
news.summary:
Can Fin Homes declared a dividend of 6 per share with an ex-date of July 11, 2025.
The company achieved a total return of 18.6% over the last 3 months.

news.title:
Can Fin Homes sees market evaluation revision, reflecting changes in key financial parameters.
Despite adjustment, strong fundamentals and performance maintain investor interest in a competitive sector.
news.summary:
Can Fin Homes sees market evaluation revision, reflecting changes in key financial parameters.
Despite adjustment, strong fundamentals and performance maintain investor interest in a competitive sector.

news.title:
Can Fin Homes declares Rs 7 interim dividend for FY25-26, record date Dec. 19.
Net profit rose 19% YoY to Rs 251 crore; stock up 14.6% in last 12 months.
news.summary:
Can Fin Homes declares Rs 7 interim dividend for FY25-26, record date Dec. 19.
Net profit rose 19% YoY to Rs 251 crore; stock up 14.6% in last 12 months.

news.title: CanFin Homes announces ₹7 dividend per share, benefiting shareholders.
news.summary: CanFin Homes announces ₹7 dividend per share, benefiting shareholders.

news.title:
eClerx Services announces Rs 300 cr buyback at Rs 4,500/share; record date is Dec 17.
Indian Oil offers Rs 5/share interim dividend; Can Fin Homes, Dr. Lal Pathlabs to consider payouts, bonuses.
news.summary:
eClerx Services announces Rs 300 cr buyback at Rs 4,500/share; record date is Dec 17.
Indian Oil offers Rs 5/share interim dividend; Can Fin Homes, Dr. Lal Pathlabs to consider payouts, bonuses.

news.title:
Dr. Lal PathLabs to trade ex-date on Dec 19 for 1:1 bonus; Can Fin Homes ex-dividend on Dec 15.
eClerx Services ex-date for buyback on Dec 17; Space Incubatrics stock split to Rs 1 on Dec 19.
news.summary:
Dr. Lal PathLabs to trade ex-date on Dec 19 for 1:1 bonus; Can Fin Homes ex-dividend on Dec 15.
